name: Missive
description: Missive — Team email and chat client combining shared inboxes, internal threads, and task management.

seo.title: Missive — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Missive: Missive — Team email and chat client combining shared inboxes, internal threads, and task management.

when_to_use: Shared team email inbox with internal threads per conversation
Collaborative customer support with task assignments in email
Unified inbox combining email and team chat in one client
SLA-tracked support email workflow with team visibility
Draft review workflow with internal chat before sending replies

pros: Team email, chat, and tasks in one app
Shared drafts and internal threads work well
cons: UI density steep for new users
Mobile apps trail the desktop experience
Analytics thinner than a full helpdesk
review.verdict: A power-user shared inbox that undercuts Front on price, if you accept a steeper learning curve.
review.best_for: Small teams wanting shared inboxes, internal chat, and tasks without paying Front prices.
review.not_for: Large support orgs needing ticketing depth and polished analytics dashboards.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
